surface_verification.justification: Framework-internal compliance-audit logic (B7 Rule E in git_log_scan + audit_detector default config). No web/UI/startable surface; no API/store/SSE/message-contract touched. Verified by the full Group-B suite (44 incl. 5 new Rule E cases) + the full shipwright-compliance suite (598 green) + ruff + a clean worktree anti-ratchet self-check.

behaviors.behavior: Rule E excludes a non-functional (chore) direct commit from B7 by default
Rule E NEVER excludes a functional (feat) commit — still flagged as drift
conventional_type parses scope / ! / case / no-prefix subjects
Rule B (bot-author) isolation preserved when Rule E is off
Existing Rules A-D + Run-ID/path/docs behaviour unaffected
behaviors.evidence: full Group-B suite 44/44 PASSED (incl. release-commit, mixed-docs, Run-ID-footer cases)
